title: Bilbao, Basque Country — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bilbao, Basque Country: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bilbao is a city in Basque Country with a population of 350,000. A transformed industrial city with the iconic Guggenheim Museum, world-class gastronomy, and a stunning green setting.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
